metadata.name: User Account - Configure Email on Mobile Phone

description: A user needs help setting up their company email account on their personal mobile phone.

nodes.task_description: Check the client's policy to ensure personal devices are allowed to connect to company email.

expected_outcome.value: The technician confirms the client's policy allows for BYOD (Bring Your Own Device).

nodes.task_description: Guide the user to install the recommended email app (e.g., Outlook Mobile) and enter their credentials.

expected_outcome.value: The user successfully adds their account.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the user to accept the mobile device management (MDM) policy prompt, which enforces security settings like a PIN code.

expected_outcome.value: The user's device is enrolled in MDM, and email begins to sync.
